svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-674" dy="-240" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f2d3d;" value="Govee H5075 — System Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="620" x="340" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontColor=#666666;" value="Both front ends connect DIRECTLY to the sensors over BLE — there is no server, API, or daemon in between." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="700" x="300" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hw" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#1f2d3d;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Hardware — BLE broadcasters (~2s advertisements, company id 0xEC88)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1060" x="120" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="hw" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="GVH5075_1098
downstairs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="120" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="hw" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="GVH5075_A7A8
garage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="440" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="hw" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="GVH5075_C375
upstairs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="760" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;" value="macOS CoreBluetooth
(BLE adapter)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="540" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eapp" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#1f2d3d;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Electron desktop app — ONE process tree (npm start)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="560" x="120" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="emain" parent="eapp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="Main process (Node.js)
main.js
• noble scan + decode (govee.js)
• throttled logging (store.js)
• ipcMain handlers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="240" x="30" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="erend" parent="eapp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="Renderer process (Chromium)
renderer/app.js
• sensor cards + sparklines
• rename / alerts / export
• NO Bluetooth logic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="230" x="300" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipc" parent="eapp" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#82b366;fontStyle=2;" value="IPC via preload.js (contextBridge): reading / ble-state → ← names / settings / export" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="500" x="30" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cliapp" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#1f2d3d;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="CLI tools — separate, optional processes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="440" x="740" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="collector" parent="cliapp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="collector.js
long-running logger" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="30" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="demo" parent="cliapp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="demo.js
live table" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="240" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diag" parent="cliapp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="diag.js
diagnostics" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="30" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="shared" parent="cliapp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=2;" value="Shared modules
govee.js (decodeH5075) · store.js (names + per-day JSON)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="240" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="files" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#1f2d3d;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Files on disk (no database)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="1060" x="120" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="namesjson" parent="files" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="names.json
{device: custom_name}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="120" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="envfile" parent="files" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;" value=".env
DEVICE=custom_name" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="440" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logs" parent="files" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="logs/readings-YYYY-MM-DD.json
(one file per day)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="760" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" target="cb" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" target="cb" value="BLE adv"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" target="cb" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="cb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#9673a6;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="emain" value="noble 'discover'"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="cb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#9673a6;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="cliapp" value="noble 'discover'"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="emain" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" target="erend" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="emain" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;" target="logs" value="append"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="collector" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;" target="logs" value="append"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="emain" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;" target="namesjson" value="read/write names"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="collector" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;" target="envfile" value="reads names"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: Both front ends connect DIRECTLY to the sensors over BLE — there is no server, API, or daemon in between.
